/CAL:SENTENCING/CTW:392/X: CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IS WAIVED FOR BHC PURPOSES ONLY,/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y/4019HALF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETE BEHAVIOR HEALTH COURT/WS/DNACOMP/IND/RX/X: NO ALCOHOL/DTC/RESTV/PPRFCOMP/WEAP/SAORD/SA1:CORINA C, GREENLAND, 150 YARDS/SA2:150 YARDS FROM AREA BOUNDED BY MARKET, CALIFORNIA, FRONT, AND CLAY STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO/X:ANY RESTITUTION AND SAO FROM #18015103 ARE HARVEY WAIVED/DEF:  SHALL COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE BY BHC PROGRAM AND MUST NOT INCUR ANY NEW ARRESTS, AND NOT VIOLATE THE STAY AWAY ORDER/CTORD: THAT IF THE DEFENDANT IS PLACED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AND LEAVES WITHOUTAUTHORIZATION OR IS TERMINATED, THEY WILL BE IN VIOLATION OF PROBATION ANDREMANDED INTO CUSTODY TO AWAIT A NEW TREATMENT PLACEMENT,/X:IF DEFENDANTLEAVES BHC OR IS TERMINATED FROM BHC, THE COURT MAY IMPOSE ADDITIONAL CUSTODY TIME/X: NO EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION WITHOUT AGREEMENT OF THE BHCPROGRAM,/X:IF THE DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE BHC PROGRAM,   CHARGES IS REDUCED TO A MISDEMEANORS PURSUANT TO PC 17(B) WITH AGREEMENT OF TEAM,/VF4: 300/PROBREVFN/PC/PSR/BKFEE/COA:40/ICNA/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:FINES ANDFEES IN THIS MATTER ARE SUSPENDED AND RESERVES THE RIGHT TO REINSTATE FINESAND FEES/PROB ADM REV/CONTD:BEHAVIOR COURT/DOP/
